DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-14-2014 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS DANIEL GERTSIKOV and IRENE GERTSIKOV's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - Defendants Daniel Gertsikov and Irene Gertsikov's Demurrer to the Complaint's Second, Third, Fourth, and Fifth causes of action is overruled. The Complaint sufficiently pleads facts to constitute causes of action for rescission and fraud. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)
